reasoning:
FIDE standard ratings and rankings are officially published on the 1st of every month and Wikipedia's tables are updated to reflect these monthly lists. 
1. For 2025-11-16 (1 week past the forecast date): The Wikipedia page will almost certainly display the exact same November 2025 ranking list as it did on 2025-11-09. Since the ranking will be identical, it will perfectly satisfy the "as high or higher" (i.e. numerically equal to or lower than) resolution criteria, leading to a near 100% chance of a YES.
2. For 2025-12-09 (1 month later): This date will reflect the December 2025 list. Lagno has been in great form recently, tying for 1st-2nd at the Sept Grand Swiss and qualifying for the Candidates. Additionally, historically she often hovers around #5-#6, meaning at #9 she has more upside than downside. Staying the same or improving her rank seems slightly more probable than dropping to #10+, so I estimate ~61%.
3. For 2026-02-07 (3 months later): The horizon here covers several more rating periods, giving other active players more chances to artificially or actively jump ahead of her, and giving her a chance to drop points if she plays. As time increases, the probability naturally drifts closer to base rate / 0.5. I estimate ~53%.
